description: Low-load routing metadata for Dendry Mod Studio checks and workflow probes.

authoring-structural.label: Authoring Structural Quick Bundle
authoring-structural.summary: Source-backed existing-object structure edits: options, effects, branches, routes, and install-plan conversion.
authoring-structural.confidence: Focused model confidence for source-backed structural editor behavior.
boundaries: Does not prove real project fixture coverage by itself.
Run realworld-quick when validating practical roundtrip support.

authoring-create.label: Authoring Create Roundtrip Bundle
authoring-create.summary: New event/card/object authoring and reopen-after-install confidence.
authoring-create.confidence: Bundled-demo confidence that new content can be created, structurally edited, applied, re-indexed, and reopened.
boundaries: Does not replace broader external fixture sweeps.

visible-edit.label: Visible Edit Bundle
visible-edit.summary: Visible player-facing content edit entries, fallback boundaries, and UI interaction contracts.
visible-edit.confidence: Focused confidence that rendered visible content exposes edit actions and preserves interaction/localization contracts.

index-contract.label: Index And Contract Bundle
index-contract.summary: ProjectIndex, parser, semantic evidence, and compatibility contract confidence.
index-contract.confidence: Repository and fixture confidence for parser/index assumptions and protected-boundary behavior.
boundaries: External SDAAH fixture coverage remains opt-in.

load-performance.label: Load Performance Bundle
load-performance.summary: Project loading, deferred coverage, shell startup, and surface regressions.
load-performance.confidence: Focused confidence for project loading and startup behavior.
boundaries: Desktop smoke should be added when native shell behavior changes.

runtime-preview.label: Runtime Preview And Lens Bundle
runtime-preview.summary: Runtime Preview/Lens models, sandbox behavior, DOM map, snapshots, and visual asset draft checks.
runtime-preview.confidence: Model confidence for temporary runtime preview/lens behavior.
boundaries: Desktop smoke/doctor are required for native runtime-shell changes.

desktop.label: Desktop Shell Bundle
desktop.summary: Electron shell and desktop package smoke confidence.
desktop.confidence: Native shell confidence for desktop behavior.
boundaries: Run from tools/project_map/desktop when using desktop npm commands.

realworld-quick.label: Real Workflow Quick Matrix
realworld-quick.summary: Bounded real-workflow support report for existing and new content roundtrips.
realworld-quick.confidence: Practical workflow confidence: supported operations, boundaries, temp-copy apply, re-index, and reopen signals.
boundaries: Not a full external fixture sweep.
Real project source must never be edited directly.

realworld-full.label: Real Workflow Full Sweep
realworld-full.summary: Opt-in deeper external fixture validation for broad real-project coverage.
realworld-full.confidence: Exploratory/deep real-world coverage, not an everyday gate.

release.label: Release And Packaging Bundle
release.summary: Public export, update notice, release links, and package surface checks.
boundaries: Do not run or edit release surfaces unless the task explicitly targets release preparation.

authoring-cards.label: Authoring Cards Bundle
authoring-cards.summary: Card Board, CardDraft, Object Canvas card editing, lane-aware install, archetype coverage, and Runtime Lens routing confidence.
authoring-cards.confidence: Focused confidence for Card Board as a context surface and Object Canvas as the detailed card editor.
boundaries: Does not replace broad runtime playthrough coverage.
Dynamic/raw card structures remain manual or partial until exact source evidence is available.

check-ci.label: Full CI Check
check-ci.confidence: Broad confidence across public export, contracts, UI, parser, authoring, runtime, starter demo, and release-link checks.
boundaries: Sandboxed runs can hit python spawn restrictions; rerun with approved escalation when needed.

tool-registry.when: Tool registry, check bundles, or check file inventory changed.

source-structure-graph.when: Route, option, branch, or source-structure graph behavior changed.

existing-scene-edit.when: Existing Scene Editor field/action/install-plan conversion changed.

route-script-intelligence.when: Route evidence classification, script impact mapping, guided script edits, or script-aware trial-run behavior changed.

route-understanding.when: Route Understanding event-chain, scheduler, utility call, or state-dependency evidence changed.

guided-route-edit.when: Guided route editors, utility call pairs, route table bindings, or explicit fallback helpers changed.

route-semantics-audit.when: Route semantics audit reporting, parser coverage reconciliation, or compiled/runtime route comparison changed.

effect-clause-workflow.when: Effect Clause Editor behavior, multi-effect lines, or hook-prefixed effect syntax changed.

install-plan.when: Install-plan operation generation, validation, or apply behavior changed.

object-authoring-canvas.when: Object Canvas rendered entries, structure actions, or draft flow changed.

card-board-model.when: Card Board model, card option focus, copy-as-draft, or lane context behavior changed.

deck-pool-model.when: Deck Pool semantic extraction or Card Board named deck pool lanes changed.

deck-object-canvas.when: Deck Pool Object Canvas fields or membership install operations changed.

advisor-controller-object-canvas.when: Advisor Controller Object Canvas fields or roster install operations changed.

card-wizard-model.when: CardDraft export, Card Wizard compatibility, or card lane-aware install generation changed.

menu-card-builder.when: Menu card parsed-to-draft, Object Canvas section options, or CardDraft rendering changed.

pinned-text-card-builder.when: Pinned/advisor text card parsing, editing, or install behavior changed.

parsed-to-draft-entry-unification.when: Parsed-to-draft entry routing or copy-as-draft parity changed.

existing-draft-extraction.when: Existing source-backed draft extraction or partial-boundary behavior changed.

install-operation-contracts.when: Install operation safety, guarded apply, anchor, or dedupe contracts changed.

install-review-ui.when: Install review UI, checklist, guarded apply, or Review & Apply controls changed.

workflow-entry-contract.when: Authoring entrypoint or workflow routing changed.

canvas-interaction-contracts.when: Canvas, Object Canvas, Storyboard, Runtime Lens, or Review & Apply controls changed.

starter-demo-model.when: Starter Demo template or profile behavior changed.

complex-event-authoring-flow.when: Complete choice units, consequence grouping, continuation summaries, or lightweight event trial-run behavior changed.

visible-object-coverage.when: Visible object coverage or deferred coverage behavior changed.

studio-performance.when: Project loading or deferred coverage behavior changed.

v067-remaining.when: Legacy v0.67 remaining regression areas changed.

runtime-visual-asset-draft.when: Runtime visual asset draft behavior changed.

asset-contract.when: Asset slot roles, directives, local file install requests, or Object Canvas asset contracts changed.

update-notice.when: Update notice or manifest behavior changed.

release-links.when: Release docs or artifact links changed.

dynamic-mod-audit.when: Deep Dynamic/SDAAH audit is explicitly requested.

large-event-pressure.when: A few large real Dynamic/SDAAH events should be pressure-tested through Event editor, route/script intelligence, trial-run, and render surfaces.

sdaah-install-write-smoke.when: SDAAH install write smoke is explicitly requested.

realworld-quick-matrix.when: Real workflow support matrix, existing-event roundtrip, or new-event roundtrip behavior changed.

check-ci-command.when: Final broad repository confidence is needed.
